title: Bartlingia brachyphylla

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, exhibiting potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions including skin infections and wounds. The bioactive constituents of Bartlingia brachyphylla include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
